page.title: Mother's Day Yacht Charter in Marbella: A Luxurious Family Tribute

data.meta_description: Celebrate Mother's Day with a luxury yacht charter in Marbella. Explore Puerto Banús, enjoy cava & snacks, and create family memories from €749/2h.
data.summary: A guide to planning a Mother's Day yacht charter in Marbella, featuring our fleet, pricing, and tips for a memorable family tribute on the Costa del Sol.
key_facts: Mother's Day yacht charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella.
Prices start at €749 for 2 hours (Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39, all inclusive).
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and 21% VAT.
Fleet ranges from 5-pax speedboats to 12-pax luxury yachts up to 29m.
Mangusta 80 variants include a free jet ski for minimum 4-hour bookings.
Typical Mediterranean weather in May: 22–26°C, calm seas, low wind.
Book via WhatsApp for custom durations, catering, or flower arrangements.
Nearby anchorages: Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, and Cabopino Bay.

faq.q: What is included in a Mother's Day yacht charter in Marbella?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, safety equipment, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, and Spanish IVA (21%). You just bring your mum and the family.

faq.q: How much does a Mother's Day yacht charter cost in Marbella?
faq.a: Prices start at €749 for 2 hours on our Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39 (up to 11 guests). For a full day (8 hours), the same boats cost €2,299. Larger yachts like the Mangusta 80 are €4,719 for 4 hours, including a jet ski. Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp.

faq.q: Which boat is best for a small family Mother's Day outing?
faq.a: For 5 guests, the Mariah SX21 or Dubhe (both 5 pax) are ideal and affordable. For 6–8 guests, the Bandido or Speedboat work well. For up to 11, the Azimut 39 or Astondoa 40 offer great value with included drinks and snacks.

faq.q: Can I bring flowers or a cake on board for Mother's Day?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring flowers, a cake, or any special treats. Our crew can help store and serve them. Just let us know via WhatsApp when booking so we can prepare.

faq.q: What is the weather like in Marbella for a Mother's Day yacht trip?
faq.a: May in Marbella averages 22–26°C with low wind and calm seas. The sun sets around 21:00, making late afternoon charters perfect for golden-hour cruising. Always check the forecast, but conditions are generally excellent.

faq.q: Where do Mother's Day yacht charters depart from?
faq.a: All our charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's iconic marina. We meet you at the port 15 minutes before departure. Parking is available nearby, or you can take a taxi to the marina entrance.

faq.q: Can we customise the itinerary for Mother's Day?
faq.a: Absolutely. Your skipper will suggest a route based on your preferences—anchor at Cala del Faro for swimming, cruise past the Golden Mile, or head to Cabopino for lunch. Just tell us what Mum loves.

faq.q: How do I book a Mother's Day yacht charter in Marbella?
faq.a: Contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date, number of guests, and any special requests. We'll confirm availability and send a booking link. A deposit secures the charter, with the balance due on the day.

data.body_html:
Mother's Day deserves more than a bunch of flowers. A luxury yacht charter in Marbella turns the occasion into a shared memory—sun, sea, and time together without a single chore. Whether your mum loves the open ocean, a chilled glass of cava, or just watching the coastline slide by, our fleet at Boat Rental Marbella offers something for every family and budget.

Why a Mother's Day yacht charter in Marbella?

Marbella in May delivers 22–26°C, calm seas, and long evenings. A private charter means no crowds, no queuing for tables, and no set menu. You control the pace: anchor for a swim, cruise past the Golden Mile villas, or simply float off Cabopino with a platter of snacks. The skipper handles everything—navigation, safety, and timing—so you can focus on Mum.

Our fleet for Mother's Day charters

We have 27 boats departing from Puerto Banús, from intimate speedboats to superyachts. Here's a quick overview:

BoatLengthMax GuestsBest for
Mariah SX216.4m5Small family, budget-friendly
Azimut 3912.5m11Mid-size family, value
Astondoa 4012.5m9Mid-size family, value
Mangusta 8024m12Luxury with jet ski
Ferretti 9429m12Ultimate luxury

All boats include a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, and 21% VAT. No hidden costs.

Pricing for Mother's Day: from €749

Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40 and Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours and go up to €2,299 for 8 hours—all inclusive. For a longer celebration, the Mangusta 80 (white or grey) is €4,719 for a minimum 4 hours, which includes a free jet ski. Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp, so you can tailor the experience exactly.

Where to cruise: Marbella's best anchorages

Your skipper will suggest a route, but here are three favourite spots for a Mother's Day charter:

  • Cala del Faro – a quiet cove east of Marbella, perfect for a swim and photos with La Concha mountain in the background.
  • Cala Cortés – near Cabopino, this sandy beach offers calm waters and a relaxed vibe.
  • Puerto Banús to Estepona – a scenic coastal run past the luxury homes of the Golden Mile, then anchor for lunch.

For more ideas, read our guide on Mother's Day yacht charter Marbella.

What to bring and expect

We provide towels, sun cream, and a cooler with drinks. You're welcome to bring flowers, a cake, or any special treats—just let us know. The crew will store and serve them. Dress in light layers; May evenings can be cool on the water. And don't forget Mum's camera—the sunset over the Mediterranean is unforgettable.

How to book your Mother's Day charter

Booking is simple: contact us on WhatsApp with your preferred date, number of guests, and any special requests (flowers, dietary needs, etc.). We'll confirm availability and send a booking link. A deposit secures the charter, with the balance due on the day. For last-minute plans, we often have availability—just ask.

Browse our full fleet at Boat Rental Marbella and choose the perfect tribute for your mum.

Frequently asked questions

What is included in a Mother's Day yacht charter in Marbella?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, safety equipment, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, and Spanish IVA (21%). You just bring your mum and the family.

How much does a Mother's Day yacht charter cost in Marbella?

Prices start at €749 for 2 hours on our Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39 (up to 11 guests). For a full day (8 hours), the same boats cost €2,299. Larger yachts like the Mangusta 80 are €4,719 for 4 hours, including a jet ski. Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp.

Which boat is best for a small family Mother's Day outing?

For 5 guests, the Mariah SX21 or Dubhe (both 5 pax) are ideal and affordable. For 6–8 guests, the Bandido or Speedboat work well. For up to 11, the Azimut 39 or Astondoa 40 offer great value with included drinks and snacks.

Can I bring flowers or a cake on board for Mother's Day?

Yes, you are welcome to bring flowers, a cake, or any special treats. Our crew can help store and serve them. Just let us know via WhatsApp when booking so we can prepare.

What is the weather like in Marbella for a Mother's Day yacht trip?

May in Marbella averages 22–26°C with low wind and calm seas. The sun sets around 21:00, making late afternoon charters perfect for golden-hour cruising. Always check the forecast, but conditions are generally excellent.

Where do Mother's Day yacht charters depart from?

All our charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's iconic marina. We meet you at the port 15 minutes before departure. Parking is available nearby, or you can take a taxi to the marina entrance.

Can we customise the itinerary for Mother's Day?

Absolutely. Your skipper will suggest a route based on your preferences—anchor at Cala del Faro for swimming, cruise past the Golden Mile, or head to Cabopino for lunch. Just tell us what Mum loves.

How do I book a Mother's Day yacht charter in Marbella?

Contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date, number of guests, and any special requests. We'll confirm availability and send a booking link. A deposit secures the charter, with the balance due on the day.
